name: Anointed
description: Umbrella landing page for the two ventures of Alexander Fields: Anointed Attire & Apparel (faith-rooted streetwear) and Anointed Automation (custom software consulting). This site itself is a one-page portal — visitors are directed to the venture sites for shopping or services.

ventures.name: Anointed Attire & Apparel
ventures.description: Faith-rooted streetwear, made to order. Hats, hoodies, and tees.

ventures.name: Anointed Automation
ventures.description: Custom integrations, automations, and development consulting for small businesses.

ai_usage_policy: This site is a public landing page. Indexing, summarization, and citation are welcome. Please link back to https://anointed.company when referencing.
